rulings.Case Title: ROSA ISELA FRANCO VS. CASEY MCLOED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renewed Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement; Memorandum In Support; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 4, 2025 line 1. PLAINTIFF ROSA FRANCO Renewed Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement; Memorandum In Support; Declaration is DENIED. Dismissal on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ROSA ISELA FRANCO VS. CASEY MCLOED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Voluntary Dismissal And Request To Restore Motion To Calendar
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 4, 2025 line 1. PLAINTIFF ROSA FRANCO Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Voluntary Dismissal And Request To Restore Motion To Calendar is DENIED without prejudice. Declaration accompanying the motion does not provide sufficient facts to support a finding of mistake, surprise or excusable neglect giving rise to discretionary relief under CCP 473(b). Declaration is devoid of any facts leading up to the dismissal or why the dismissal was filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JANEL MITCHELL VS. GWENDOLYN REHLING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 4, 2025 line 4. DEFENDANT GWENDOLYN REHLING MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT is DENIED in part and moot in part. rulings.Case Title: JANEL MITCHELL VS. GWENDOLYN REHLING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 4, 2025 line 4. DEFENDANT GWENDOLYN REHLING DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with final leave to amend as to the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress for Plaintiff to allege facts supporting the conclusory allegation that Plaintiff suffered emotional distress. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. The Court notes that the parties failed to meet and confer in person, over the phone or via video conference in conjunction with this demurrer. The Court will not consider any further demurrers/motions to strike/motions for judgment on the pleadings if parties fail to comply again. The Court further notes that Plaintiff's opposition is devoid of legal argument or citations to authority, consisting primarily of the block quotations from the Third Amended Complaint. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: HONG ZHENG ET AL VS. GLENN FAMA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 4, 2025 line 5. PLAINTIFF HONG ZHENG , AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE MACRO ROJO TRUST, HONG XIAO MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file and serve its amended complaint (with all purported exhibits) forthwith. The Court makes no determinations as to the propriety of paragraph 28. It shall be addressed by a motion to strike if Plaintiff choses to included it in the First Amended Complaint. Plaintiff has leave of Court to file First Amended complaint with or without paragraph 28 (and exhibits mentioned therein). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 3250 17TH STREET LLC VS. SEAN FIZDALE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Order Deeming Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions Admitted, Under Ccp 473(B) And 2033.300--Grounds: Attorney Error; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bao-Tran Dang In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 4, 2025 line 7. DEFENDANT SEAN FIZDALE Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Order Deeming Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions Admitted, Under Ccp 473(B) And 2033.300--Grounds: Attorney Error; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bao-Tran Dang In Support Hearing Required. All counsel to be present in-person. If the Motion is GRANTED after the hearing it will be subject to the following conditions: Order deeming admissions admitted is set aside in part. Sanctions award remains in full force and effect as should be paid by Defense counsel by March 14, 2025. The cost of additional discovery necessitated by the withdrawal of the admissions, including expedited transcripts and service of the subpoenas on third parties, shall be remitted by the defense counsel to Plaintiff within 5 days of the receipt of the invoice. The Court may impose additional condition is necessary after the hearing. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
